escalation.rationale: US-Iran peace talks stalled as Trump cancelled envoy trip to Pakistan, while RAF jets engaged Russian drones and massive drone swarms hit Ukraine overnight.

ticker_items: Trump cancels US envoy trip to Pakistan, Iran talks stall
RAF jets shoot down Russian drones attacking Ukrainian ports
Russia launches 660+ drone attack on Ukraine overnight
Israel awaits US approval for renewed Iran operations
Kuwait reports drone attacks from Iraq on border posts

eastern_europe.description: Overnight drone swarm attack with over 660 drones wounded over dozen civilians including children.
Russian forces attacked Ukrainian ports on the River Danube prompting RAF response.

middle_east.description: Israeli forces killed at least 12 Palestinians in Gaza amid alleged ceasefire violations.
Israeli forces killed six Hezbollah fighters in exchange of fire despite ceasefire extension.
Drones launched from Iraq targeted Kuwaiti border posts causing material damage.

middle_east.text: The country's military is prepared to renew the war against Iran but is waiting for a U.S. green light to proceed.
middle_east.speaker: Israel Katz
middle_east.title: Israeli Defense Minister

middle_east.text: The Israeli escalation represents the failure of the international community to uphold the truce in Gaza.
middle_east.speaker: Hamas spokesperson
middle_east.title: Hamas official

observers.description: RAF Eurofighters scrambled from Romania to intercept Russian drones attacking Ukrainian Danube ports. UK faces US pressure over Falklands sovereignty amid Iran war tensions.
Hosting stalled US-Iran peace negotiations in Islamabad with Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi present. Trump cancelled planned US envoy visit, dealing setback to diplomatic efforts.
Pentagon reportedly considers suspending Spain from NATO for refusing to join Iran war operations. Spain has rebuffed US punishment reports while maintaining non-participation stance.

financial.notes: Gold prices gained slightly but headed for first weekly loss in five weeks amid Iran conflict volatility and inflation concerns.

update_log.text: Trump calls off planned US envoy trip to Pakistan, stalling Iran peace negotiations on day 58 of conflict.
RAF jets intercept Russian drones attacking Ukrainian Danube ports from Romanian base.
Russia launches massive overnight drone attack on Ukraine with over 660 drones, wounding dozen+ civilians.
Israeli forces kill 12 Palestinians in Gaza amid ongoing ceasefire violations.
